title: Jem font
description: A simple font I made - pretty basic but supports the Latin, Cyrillic, Greek and Georgian scripts.
body: It's font I made, I think it's pretty cool. It's a bit of a simplified version of the default one, with a fair few characters being narrower or as their simpler form (like the single tiered "a", and more examples in Cyrillic and Georgian). It supports the Latin, Cyrillic (Кириллица), Greek (Ελληνικό) and Georgian (მხედრული) scripts, and quite a few accented letters as well.
